data.content: Plan review: APPROVED. Plan is complete and addresses all 8 acceptance criteria with feasible implementation steps. Existing test infrastructure (cli_dispatch_agent, cli_workflows, loom_compat_prompt_resolution_tests) provides strong foundation for reuse. Key notes for implementer: (1) CLI regression matrix child (6d98) can likely proceed with current prompt semantics even while 5464 is in planning; only profile output variant child (374f) truly depends on 5464 settling. (2) Keep Playwright rendered-fixture minimal — don't over-invest in browser infra when Rust integration tests carry the primary regression value. (3) Anti-fallback markers should reference static skill text from skills/*.md to detect regressions precisely.
